_note: Klipper — validate and configure Klipper on new Raspbian Lite baseline. Sprint: 2026-06-09 to 2026-06-13. Assignee: Swaminath (101084655).

tasks.name: Validate Klipper host compatibility on Raspbian Lite
tasks.description:
Confirm Klipper's host-side dependencies are satisfiable on the new Lite baseline before installing.

Prerequisites: Raspbian Lite baseline image is built and boots.
Done when: all required packages are identified, installed, and version-pinned in a manifest.

subtasks.name: Verify Python version and virtualenv install path for Klipper on new OS
subtasks.description:
Confirm Klipper's minimum Python version is available and that the virtualenv can be created at the expected path.
Done when: python3 --version matches Klipper requirements and virtualenv creates without errors.

subtasks.name: Validate required host packages are installable
subtasks.description:
Confirm gcc, make, libffi-dev, python3-dev, python3-serial and other build deps are available via apt on the Lite image.
Done when: all packages install without errors on a clean Lite image.

subtasks.name: Pin and record confirmed working package versions in a manifest
subtasks.description:
After successful install, capture exact package versions into a manifest file for reproducible builds.
Done when: manifest file is committed to the repository.

tasks.name: Install and configure Klipper service on new image
tasks.description:
Run the Klipper install process on the clean Lite baseline and configure it to start reliably.

Prerequisites: host compatibility validated.
Done when: Klipper starts, connects to MCU, and enters ready state after a cold reboot.

subtasks.name: Run Klipper install script against the clean Lite baseline
subtasks.description:
Execute install-klippy.sh (or equivalent) on the new image. Resolve any failures.
Done when: Klipper host process starts without errors.

subtasks.name: Configure systemd service unit for correct startup ordering
subtasks.description:
Ensure the Klipper service starts after network and serial device targets are up.
Done when: Klipper service shows active after reboot with no dependency failures.

subtasks.name: Verify Klipper connects to MCU and enters ready state after reboot
subtasks.description:
Reboot the printer and confirm Klipper successfully connects to the MCU and transitions to ready.
Done when: tested on two consecutive reboots with no manual intervention.

tasks.name: Validate MCU serial and CAN communication reliability
tasks.description:
Confirm the communication channel between the Klipper host and the MCU is stable on the new OS.

Prerequisites: Klipper service installed and starts.
Done when: serial connection is stable across reboots and disconnect/reconnect events.

subtasks.name: Test USB serial stability across cold and warm reboots
subtasks.description:
Reboot three times (cold) and restart Klipper service twice (warm). Confirm MCU reconnects each time.
Done when: all five reconnect attempts succeed without manual intervention.

subtasks.name: Test disconnect and reconnect recovery during idle
subtasks.description:
Physically unplug and replug the USB cable while Klipper is idle. Confirm Klipper recovers.
Done when: Klipper returns to ready state within 30 seconds of replug.

subtasks.name: Confirm baud rate and device path assignments are stable
subtasks.description:
Verify /dev/serial/by-id or udev rules produce a consistent device path after reboot.
Done when: device path is the same across three consecutive reboots.

tasks.name: Revalidate printer config and safety macros
tasks.description:
Confirm existing printer.cfg and macros work correctly on the new OS and Klipper version.

Prerequisites: Klipper service running and MCU connected.
Done when: config check passes and all safety macros fire correctly.

subtasks.name: Run startup config sanity check on printer.cfg
subtasks.description:
Run Klipper in config-check mode and resolve any warnings or errors in printer.cfg.
Done when: config check exits with zero errors.

subtasks.name: Test homing, bed mesh, and heater safety sequences
subtasks.description:
Execute homing (G28), bed mesh levelling, and heater PID tune. Confirm all complete without errors.
Done when: all three sequences complete successfully.

subtasks.name: Verify emergency stop and fault recovery macros fire correctly
subtasks.description:
Trigger an emergency stop (M112) and a simulated fault. Confirm Klipper halts safely and recovers on restart.
Done when: e-stop halts immediately and Klipper recovers cleanly after restart.

tasks.name: Run print regression validation
tasks.description:
Confirm print quality and motion are at least equivalent to the previous baseline on the new OS.

Prerequisites: config and macros validated.
Done when: short, medium, and comparison prints complete without regressions.

subtasks.name: Execute short calibration print for input shaping and pressure advance
subtasks.description:
Print standard calibration patterns. Confirm results are within acceptable range.
Done when: calibration print completes and values are recorded.

subtasks.name: Execute a medium print (1-2 hr) and monitor for communication drops
subtasks.description:
Run a 1-2 hour print job. Check Klipper logs for any serial timeouts or missed steps.
Done when: print completes with no communication errors in logs.

subtasks.name: Compare output quality and motion against previous baseline
subtasks.description:
Measure dimensional accuracy and surface quality of the medium print vs the previous baseline print.
Done when: no significant regression is detected and comparison is documented.

tasks.name: Verify Klipper to OctoPrint command path
tasks.description:
Confirm the full command path from OctoPrint through to Klipper works on the new OS stack.

Prerequisites: OctoPrint upgraded (Control Center tasks), Klipper running.
Done when: start/pause/resume/cancel all succeed and errors propagate correctly.

subtasks.name: Validate job submission from OctoPrint to Klipper
subtasks.description:
Upload a print file to OctoPrint and start a job. Confirm Klipper receives and begins the job.
Done when: print job starts in Klipper from OctoPrint without errors.

subtasks.name: Verify print state and progress events propagate back to OctoPrint
subtasks.description:
Monitor OctoPrint UI and API while a job runs. Confirm percentage progress and state changes update correctly.
Done when: progress updates appear in OctoPrint within 5 seconds of Klipper state change.

subtasks.name: Confirm Klipper errors surface in OctoPrint and Control Center
subtasks.description:
Trigger a recoverable Klipper error (e.g. temperature runaway simulation). Confirm it appears in OctoPrint and Control Center UI.
Done when: error is visible in both interfaces within 10 seconds.
